string.text: Boss, I'm planning an educational course about safety regulations aboard the Elmo. I'd appreciate it if you could help me inform the other Dolls. Also, make sure to be present too!
Nikketa, glad to have you back!
Boss, I'm the one on duty today. Let's start the day off in compliance with Elmo Safety Regulations.
Nikketa, what's that bracelet on your left wrist?
This pair of handcuffs? Don't get me wrong, it's not something I snuck out of my previous service. I made it myself, it's like an amulet of sort.
Nikketa, let's go out on patrol.
Want to join me in defending justice, Boss?
Okay Nikketa, please head back to base. I will handle it from here.
No, Boss, I'm not slacking off! I'm just wondering what your idea of “justice” is!
